title: For cash-strapped farmers, deal to end Iran fighting comes too late
description: Some of the president’s strongest supporters are hurting as midterm elections approach.

title: Trump's job approval rating has dropped to 36%, a new NPR/ PBS News/Marist poll shows
description: President Trump's numbers are falling, as many Americans harbor concerns about the economy. His approval now stands at 36% — according to the latest NPR/ PBS News/Marist Poll — a new low.

title: Ohio Gov. Mike DeWine explains why he called for abolishing the state's death penalty"
description: Ohio's Governor says that his state should end the death penalty. NPR's Scott Simon talks to Gov. Mike DeWine, a Republican, about why he changed his mind on a practice he once supported.

title: Week in Politics: U.S.-Israel ties; Trump and Vance oppose ceasefire critics
description: President Trump and his vice-president pushed back against critics of the agreement to extend the ceasefire with Iran. Some Republican lawmakers have found the agreement wanting.

title: A look at the relationship between Obama and Trump
description: President Trump did not attend the grand opening of the Obama Presidential Center in Chicago -- he wasn't invited. But his presence was felt in the speeches by former President Barack Obama and Michelle Obama.

title: A California man's case highlights gaps in care and oversight at DHS detention centers
description: Federal officers shot Ricardo Parias eight months ago during an ICE operation to detain him. His lawyer says he is still in pain, highlighting gaps in oversight and care in DHS facilities.

title: Trump visits new Air Force One, a luxury gift from Qatar that will soon fly him
description: The 747 jumbo jet has a new blue, red and gold paint scheme preferred by the president.

title: In a New York district, a fight for the future of the left
description: Rep. Nydia Velázquez's retirement has opened up a competitive primary in a New York City Congressional district. The race to replace her is a proxy battle about the future of the Democratic Party.

title: Air Force One, gifted to Trump from Qatar, arrives at Joint Base Andrews
description: The luxury Boeing 747, initially valued at $400 million, arrived ahead of schedule on Friday. The jet caused controversy as one of the biggest foreign gifts ever received by the U.S. government.

title: Italy's Meloni, once Trump's closest ally in Europe, says he made up a story about her
description: "Italy and I do not beg," Meloni said in a video rebuke posted on social media Friday. Italy's top diplomat, meanwhile, said he was cancelling a visit to the U.S because of the alleged remarks.

title: Algae clouded Trump's vision for the Reflecting Pool. But scientists aren't surprised
description: The shallow, sunny waters of the reflecting pool are an ideal incubator for algae growth in the summertime. Experts say the recent renovation may have helped accelerate it.

title: What you need to know about the preliminary U.S.-Iran agreement signed by Trump
description: Here's a look at the preliminary agreement between the U.S. and Iran, and the challenges that remain to find lasting peace.
